personal.name: Arie Setiadi
personal.about: Fullstack developer from Bali, Indonesia. I work across the stack — Laravel, NestJS on the backend, React and Vue on the frontend, PostgreSQL and Redis underneath. 3+ years shipping real products for companies and government clients. Looking for remote opportunities with product-focused teams.

projects.title: Kantanya Bali Tour
projects.subtitle: Travel booking platform for a Bali-based tour agency
projects.description: A full-featured travel booking website for Kantanya Bali Tour. Visitors can browse curated tour packages, explore destination galleries, and complete bookings in a few steps. Built with an admin panel using FilamentPHP for the client to manage packages and content independently without technical knowledge.

projects.title: Daikin E-Recruitment (Job Portal)
projects.subtitle: Applicant-facing job portal for PT Daikin Airconditioning Indonesia
projects.description:
A web-based recruitment portal for PT Daikin Airconditioning Indonesia, built under PT Eannovate Creative Technology. The platform allows applicants to browse open positions, submit applications, and track application status in real time. Includes OTP-based identity verification and email notifications for status updates.

Note: this is a company project — I was solely responsible for the applicant-facing web portal. The CMS and backend administration were handled by other team members.

projects.title: Aesthetic Wedding Invitation
projects.subtitle: Elegant digital wedding invitation with RSVP functionality
projects.description: A personalized digital wedding invitation website with a clean, aesthetic design. Guests receive a unique URL with their name pre-filled and can confirm attendance via a built-in RSVP form. Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop. Built with a Laravel backend to handle guest management and RSVP data.

projects.title: Modern Wedding Invitation
projects.subtitle: Modern, responsive digital wedding invitation with RSVP
projects.description: A second iteration of the digital wedding invitation product with a more modern visual direction. Guests access a personalized link and RSVP directly from the page. Designed to work seamlessly on all screen sizes. Same Laravel-backed architecture as the first version, refined based on client feedback.

projects.title: Damamaya Cyber Monitor
projects.subtitle: Internal monitoring dashboard for Denpasar city government
projects.description: An internal web application built for the Denpasar Communication, Informatics, and Statistics Office. The platform centralizes monitoring of citizen complaints, tracks local and national issues relevant to the city, and flags security vulnerabilities across Denpasar's government subdomains — replacing a fragmented manual process.

projects.title: Room Scheduling App
projects.subtitle: Meeting room booking system with approval workflow for a government office
projects.description: A meeting room scheduling system built for the Denpasar Communication, Informatics, and Statistics Office to replace a fragmented document-based process. Officers can submit booking requests, and administrators can approve, reject, or flag schedule conflicts — all from a centralized interface. Eliminates double-booking caused by uncoordinated spreadsheets.

projects.title: Demo Company Profile
projects.subtitle: Customizable company profile website with self-managed admin panel
projects.description: A demo-ready company profile website with a fully integrated admin panel built on FilamentPHP. Content changes made in the admin panel reflect on the public-facing site in real time — no developer needed for updates. Built as a reusable template for small business clients. The demo resets every 2 hours so anyone can freely test the admin panel without permanent side effects.

projects.title: Virtual Tour Website
projects.subtitle: 360° virtual tour web app for a historic Balinese palace
projects.description: A 360-degree virtual tour application built to introduce Puri Agung Kerambitan, a historic Balinese palace with limited tourist reach. Users can explore the palace grounds interactively from any device without being physically present. Built using 3DVista for the immersive tour engine, wrapped in a lightweight web frontend.
